sessionNotes.note: Project started. Couple, no kids, 2BR apartment in Egypt. Interactive planning + product research + decision tools.
Location: 6th of October City. Apartment empty/unfurnished. Budget total deferred. Second bedroom = hybrid guest + office. First deep-dive: fridge.
User feedback: prefer lifestyle questions over low-level product specs. Fridge: no dispenser, budget 20–35k EGP. Infer specs from lifestyle.
Fridge lane: max food + freezer space. NOT buying AC. Question style: lifestyle + occasional blocking constraints. Curtains/blackout and airflow matter more without AC.
Inventory: cooker, vacuum, air fryer, kettle, iron, blender. Nothing for water heater/fans/washer/furniture/curtains/lighting. Inventory marked basically complete.

Project vision aligned: whole-home plan + tiny details over time; MD/JSON memory for endless revisits; expensive purchases first; styling/layout/design standards; max 3 deep personality-first questions; both partners equal; slow deliberate; light tools that grow if useful. See PROJECT.md.
Couple brief: cozy nest arrival; user=function partner=aesthetics; home=stable base; private nest family occasional; conflict style TBD first shared home — dual-gate decision rule drafted.
Focus shift: big appliances repository first. Playwright B.TECH wave: ~150 SKUs fridge+washer+electric water heater into data/appliances/catalog.json + appliances.html.

Decision method locked: explain tradeoffs → max 3 preference Qs → parallel subagent pros/cons → synthesize. Fridge prefs: balance both layouts with models; hard ceiling 35k; hate noisy/unreliable/ugly/too small. 5 subagents researched candidates; see notes/research/fridge-batch-2026-07-17.md
Data UX priority: catalog v2 with 150/150 product photos, gallery UI appliances.html (filter, star, modal pros/cons). Deep research fields on ~10 fridge models.

Washer pass complete: top-load full-auto black 7-9kg. Market thin — 3 main SKUs + adjacent 11-13kg black inverter options. Gallery washer-gallery.html. Water heater deferred. Next scope: kitchen storage + TV.
Kitchen: storage only ≤25k, empty room, quality-first (IKEA OK not mandatory). Drill OK. Balanced zones. kitchen-gallery.html + kitchen_catalog.json with 3 kits.

Second-pass fridge+washer for buy-tomorrow: Playwright across B.TECH/Jumia/Amazon.eg/2B. Fridge still Beko 406L black inverter platform — Amazon XBIDB 27,099 beats B.TECH IDEGB 30,299; Jumia IDEGB 24,999 marketplace risk. Tornado 450 black inv 28.9k freeze-first. Washer Sharp 9kg black still #1 ~13.5k. Full report: notes/research/fridge-washer-second-pass-2026-07-17.md

Expand pass: color soft. B.TECH-only catalogs rebuilt — 72 fridges (31 black, 23 inv) + 26 washers (10 main 7–9kg). UI Black only filter on fridge-gallery + washer-gallery. Rank weights reliability/inverter over pure black. Top fridge all-color: Beko 455 black inv / Beko 406 silver inv value. Top washer: Sharp 9 black; Toshiba silver value if flex.

decisions.decision: Will not purchase AC for this apartment setup
implications: Raise priority of blackout curtains, fans, cross-ventilation, lighter fabrics
Budget that would have gone to AC can go to fridge, washer, water heater, mattress, lighting

decisions.decision: Optimize for max food + freezer space; black + hard 35k; top-freezer preferred
finalists: Beko 406L black inverter (Amazon XBIDB ~27.1k or B.TECH IDEGB ~30.3k)
decisions.backup: Zanussi/Fresh black non-inv if protecting cash (noise tradeoff)

decisions.flex: LG 13kg black inverter ~19.5k if noise/reliability > size

decisions.decision: Baseline owned/gifted set recorded; treat as complete for now
implications: Remove cooker and most small appliances from buy lists
Still need: fridge, washer, water heater, full furniture, lighting, curtains/textiles
Optional later: hood, microwave, fans, coffee gear
